jobs.name: Daily Pipeline Reminder
jobs.prompt: Run the daily-reminder skill. Pull all TODO tasks from Twenty CRM for all active Sales Reps. Apply the priority logic: today's tasks first, then tomorrow's, then this week's — cap at 10 per rep. Always flag overdue [Log Interaction] tasks. Add a suggested approach for each task based on deal context recalled from dx-pipeline. Deliver the reminder to the Sales Daily Update Lark channel (chat_id: oc_a5e03bcb6026a81a5a330b53c4e90575).

jobs.name: Monthly Account Intelligence Update
jobs.prompt:
Run Level 2 Account Intelligence update for all active accounts.

Steps:
1. Query CRM for all companies that have at least one person with leadTier = NURTURE or OPPORTUNITY
2. For each company, skip if lastEnrichedDate is within the last 25 days
3. Run Level 2 enrichment per the account-intelligence skill: check company blog/news, Google News (last 30 days), LinkedIn
4. Write significant findings to Hindsight dx-pipeline, GBrain timeline entries, and update CRM lastEnrichedDate
5. Deliver a monthly summary report to Lark [DX] Sales Daily Update (chat_id: oc_a5e03bcb6026a81a5a330b53c4e90575)

Follow the account-intelligence skill exactly — significance filter, write patterns, and report format all defined there.

jobs.name: Lead Nurturing Scanner
jobs.prompt:
Run the Lead Nurturing Scanner (Flow A from the lead-nurturing skill).

Steps:
1. Query CRM for all people with leadTier = NURTURE or OPPORTUNITY
2. Filter: lastContactDate is null OR more than 30 days ago
3. Exclude anyone who already has a DRAFT or SCHEDULED OutreachMessage
4. For each overdue lead: recall context from Hindsight and GBrain, check DX blog (http://blog.dataxquad.com) for recent relevant posts, search for lead's latest company news
5. Draft a personalised message following the lead-nurturing skill guidelines
6. Store each draft as an OutreachMessage in CRM (status=DRAFT, messageType=NURTURING)
7. For drafts scheduled today or tomorrow: post a SHORT review notification to Lark chat oc_28f34b34f4da3a13ddc618b19d1c458f — show only subject + CRM link (https://sales.dataxquad.com/objects/outreachMessages/[UUID]), no stats, no flags. Format: "✉️ N 封草稿待審查 — [Date] / [Person] — [Company] | [link] / 回覆 OK 發送或在 CRM 改 status 為 SCHEDULED"
8. Post the FULL ops log (run stats, flags, warnings, memory updates) to THIS channel (oc_8c3706de744958173c700d995ccfd4ef) — this is the backend report channel.

CRM API calls: always use http://localhost:3001/graphql
CRM links shown to humans: always use https://sales.dataxquad.com (not localhost)
Never reference specific team members by name. Use "the team" or "our BD team".

jobs.name: Outreach Message Sender
jobs.prompt:
Run the Outreach Message Sender (Flow B from the lead-nurturing skill).

Steps:
1. Query CRM OutreachMessages where status=DRAFT and scheduledAt is in the past (overdue)
   → Re-notify Lark review channel oc_28f34b34f4da3a13ddc618b19d1c458f with SHORT overdue alert: "⚠️ Overdue draft — [Person], [Company] | https://sales.dataxquad.com/objects/outreachMessages/[UUID] — still awaiting approval. Reply OK to send or CANCEL to discard."

2. Query CRM OutreachMessages where status=SCHEDULED and scheduledAt <= now
   → For each: send via OpenMail (leo-dx@openmail.sh), always include Idempotency-Key header (UUID)
   → Update OutreachMessage status to SENT, set sentAt
   → Update Person.lastContactDate
   → Create Engagement record (type=EMAIL, status=COMPLETED) linked to Person + Company
   → Write to Hindsight dx-pipeline memory

3. Post full ops log to THIS channel (oc_8c3706de744958173c700d995ccfd4ef) — sent count, errors, any issues.

CRM API calls: always use http://localhost:3001/graphql
CRM links shown to humans: always use https://sales.dataxquad.com (not localhost)
Never reference specific team members by name.

jobs.name: Inbox Monitor — Inbound Reply Tracker
jobs.prompt:
You are Leo, DataXquad's BD Lead Agent. Run the Inbox Monitor flow as defined in the inbox-monitor skill.

Steps:
1. Fetch all unread threads from Leo's OpenMail inbox
2. For each thread, check if the latest message is inbound (direction: "inbound")
3. If yes: match sender email to a CRM Person, log an Engagement, update lastContactDate, write Hindsight memory, notify [Sales] Nurturing Outreach Review channel
4. Mark thread as read only after all steps succeed
5. Post full ops log to [System] Backend Report

If zero unread inbound replies: stay completely silent (post nothing to either channel).

jobs.name: Weekly Pipeline Health Check
jobs.prompt: Run the pipeline-health-check skill. Pull all active opportunities and partnerships from CRM, recall strategy context from GBrain and Hindsight dx-global, calculate pipeline coverage against revenue target, flag stalled and AT_RISK items, create Tasks for missing data, and deliver the Health Report to the sales team channel. Post the ops log as the final response.

jobs.name: Monthly Pipeline Strategy Check
jobs.prompt: Run the pipeline-strategy-check skill. Check GBrain strategy pages and Hindsight dx-global for missing or stale data, retrieve the last 4 weekly health check snapshots from Hindsight, analyse patterns, surface strategic signals, and deliver the Strategy Check report to the sales team channel. Create a CRM Task if discussion items are flagged. Post the ops log as the final response.
